AOR CLI command surface

Output modes:
  - guided shortcuts default to human-readable output.
  - --json keeps the full machine-readable schema for compatibility.
  - --json compact prints only populated command fields for operator inspection.

Implemented commands:
Guided shortcuts:
  - aor doctor
  - aor onboard
  - aor app
  - aor next
  - aor mission create

Project topology:
  - aor project list
  - aor project add
  - aor project import
  - aor project repository
  - aor project component
  - aor project dependency
  - aor project topology

Execution setup:
  - aor route show
  - aor route select
  - aor route reset
  - aor route check

Core lifecycle:
  - aor project init
  - aor project analyze
  - aor project validate
  - aor project verify
  - aor handoff prepare
  - aor handoff approve
  - aor intake create
  - aor discovery run
  - aor spec build
  - aor wave create
  - aor plan create
  - aor plan show
  - aor plan diff
  - aor plan revise
  - aor plan approve
  - aor plan status

Run control:
  - aor run start
  - aor run pause
  - aor run resume
  - aor run steer
  - aor run cancel
  - aor run retry
  - aor run answer
  - aor run status

Review and QA:
  - aor eval run
  - aor harness replay
  - aor harness certify
  - aor asset promote
  - aor asset freeze
  - aor compiler revision
  - aor review run
  - aor review decide

Delivery:
  - aor deliver prepare
  - aor multirepo lock
  - aor packet show
  - aor evidence show

Release:
  - aor release prepare
  - aor learning handoff

Operations:
  - aor incident open
  - aor incident backfill
  - aor incident recertify
  - aor incident show
  - aor audit runs
  - aor finance monitor
  - aor request create
  - aor request run
  - aor request status
  - aor ui attach
  - aor ui detach

Planned commands (not implemented yet):

Use 'aor <command> --help' for guided shortcuts or 'aor <group> <command> --help' for grouped command contracts.
